value_proposition.cpm: We help true-crime-loving adults turn an ordinary night at home into a suspenseful detective experience through premium instant-download case files they can solve tonight, without shipping delays, subscription commitment, or cheesy party-game energy.
value_proposition.tagline: Open the file. Solve the case.
value_proposition.elevator_pitch: Declassified Cases turns passive true-crime nights into active investigations. Each digital case delivers a premium dossier-style mystery with layered documents, clues, and narrative progression you can start in minutes, whether you're playing solo, with a partner, or with a small group.

paradigm_shift.old_way: Buying a mystery game meant choosing between shipped subscription boxes, big party formats, or cheap-looking printable PDFs.
paradigm_shift.new_way: This is not just a mystery game. It is a premium at-home detective night: instant, story-rich, adult-feeling entertainment that bridges true-crime bingeing, escape-room energy, and a one-night shared experience.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: Customers often decide the same night they want something better than streaming, and waiting for shipping kills momentum.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Lead with 'instant access after purchase' and 'start in minutes tonight' in headlines, product pages, and ads.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats Unsolved Case Files and Hunt A Killer by removing shipping delay and making same-night play possible.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: Many buyers want a complete 2-4 hour experience without getting locked into subscriptions or long multi-box arcs.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Frame each case as a complete one-night investigation for $19.99 with no subscription required.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats Hunt A Killer by offering category satisfaction without recurring commitment, higher spend, or multi-box pacing.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: Couples want an activity that feels memorable and collaborative, not awkward, childish, or overly gamer-centric.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Use date-night-oriented copy, show two-person play, and describe it as a shared investigation rather than role-play.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats Cryptic Killers and murder mystery party game alternatives by focusing on intimate 2-player and small-group solving instead of hosted party theatrics.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: Digital mystery buyers are skeptical of cheap-looking PDFs and generic downloadable content.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Show polished file previews, envelope progression, document counts, and declassified-file branding to signal craftsmanship.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats Etsy printables and weaker downloadable competitors by positioning as a premium digital file case, not a commodity printable.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: Players care more about uncovering a coherent case than solving random puzzles disconnected from the story.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Emphasize evidence, scenes, suspects, clues, and a complete narrative arc instead of generic puzzle language.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats escape-room-at-home kits and puzzle-forward alternatives by offering stronger detective-story immersion and evidence-based progression.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: The same product must work for solo players, couples, and small groups without feeling compromised.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Clearly state 1-6 players, show multiple use cases, and explain that collaboration scales naturally across player counts.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats party-only formats and some detective games that implicitly favor larger groups or solo-only play.

differentiation_pillars.why_it_matters: Buyers compare the purchase against escape rooms, dinner out, streaming, and board games, not just direct competitors.
differentiation_pillars.how_to_communicate: Anchor value around 2-4 hours of entertainment, 14-21 documents, and one purchase for up to 6 players.
differentiation_pillars.against_whom: Beats in-person escape rooms and out-of-home activities by delivering a lower-cost, lower-friction at-home alternative.

message_house.core_message: Turn tonight at home into a suspenseful case you solve together, without the cost, planning, or awkwardness of a typical date-night activity.
supporting_proof_points: Instant access after purchase means you can start tonight without waiting for shipping.
Designed for 1-6 players, so it works naturally as a two-person date-night experience.
Each case delivers 2-4 hours of story-driven entertainment for $19.99, often less than one out-of-home activity for two.
message_house.objection_neutralizer: This is not a cheesy party game or scripted role-play night. It is a guided detective experience with documents, clues, and a mature dossier feel built for collaborative solving.
sample_headlines: Date Night, But Make It a Case File.
Skip Another Movie Night. Solve a Mystery Together.
The At-Home Date Night That Starts in Minutes.

message_house.core_message: Give your group a fresh, story-led game night centerpiece that feels more immersive than a board game and easier to run than a murder mystery party.
supporting_proof_points: Works for 1-6 players, making it a fit for small groups and casual hosted nights.
The 4-envelope structure and document-based flow create easy progression without needing a facilitator.
Instant digital delivery removes shipping delays when weekend plans come together fast.
message_house.objection_neutralizer: You do not need costumes, a host script, or a complicated rules explanation. The case itself guides the group through the investigation.
sample_headlines: Your Next Game Night Needs a Case, Not Another Board.
A Small-Group Mystery That Does Not Need a Game Master.
Bring One New Thing to Game Night: A Case to Solve.

message_house.core_message: Give a thoughtful mystery experience they can start instantly, instead of another generic gift that gets forgotten.
supporting_proof_points: Instant access after purchase makes it ideal for same-day or last-minute gifting.
It fits multiple play styles: solo, couple, or small-group, which lowers gifting risk.
At $19.99, it feels more memorable than a gift card while staying within a practical gift budget.
message_house.objection_neutralizer: Even if they are not a 'gamer,' the experience is framed around true-crime-style investigation and storytelling, not hardcore game mechanics.
sample_headlines: Gift an Experience, Not More Stuff.
A Last-Minute Gift That Still Feels Thoughtful.
For the Person Who Loves True Crime More Than Clutter.

tone_by_context.example_copy: You could scroll for another hour... or open a case file and spend tonight solving one. Instant access. 2-4 hours. No shipping. No subscription.
Inside the case: 4 envelopes, 14-21 documents, and a full investigation designed for 1-6 players. Download instantly, follow the evidence, and uncover the truth in a 2-4 hour experience.

tone_by_context.tone: inviting, narrative, and conversion-focused without sounding pushy
tone_by_context.example_copy: Tonight's plan is sitting in your inbox. One case. Four envelopes. A trail of evidence waiting to be untangled. If movie night feels too predictable, open the file instead.

tone_by_context.tone: curious, culturally aware, and lightly playful with a true-crime wink
tone_by_context.example_copy: For people who say 'just one more true crime episode' and mean three: this time, you are the investigator. Start a digital case tonight.
Case drop: if you want a better plan for tonight, this is it. Grab the file, open the first envelope, and see how far your instincts get you.

allowed.evidence: Listed in verified facts and allowed claims.

allowed.claim: Each case is a 2-4 hour experience
allowed.evidence: Listed in verified facts and allowed claims.

allowed.claim: Playable solo, as a couple, or with a group of up to 6
Each case includes 4 envelopes with documents and clues
allowed.evidence: Verified facts specify 4 envelopes per case and 14-21 documents per case.
Verified format is digital download only.
Verified facts and allowed claims specify the per-case price.

allowed.claim: Lower upfront cost than many shipped mystery box competitors
allowed.evidence: Competitor pricing in market analysis places major physical brands commonly around $29.99-$50+.

allowed.claim: An at-home alternative to escape-room-style spending
allowed.evidence: Market analysis notes in-person escape rooms commonly run about $30-$50 per person, while this product is $19.99 per case.
Instant access after purchase supports play without shipping wait or advance planning.

restricted.claim: The only premium digital detective experience for adults
restricted.reason: Exclusivity cannot be claimed without evidence, and the category includes other digital competitors.

restricted.claim: Based on real cases or real police files
restricted.reason: The product context explicitly forbids implying real cases or real police reports because these are fictional.
There are no verified awards or press mentions.
There are no verified customer counts or review volumes.
No refund or satisfaction guarantee is verified.
The brand name suggests regularity, but no verified release cadence is provided and unsupported promises should not be made.

restricted.claim: Better than competitor X by measured satisfaction or quality metrics
restricted.reason: No validated comparative performance data exists.

restricted.claim: Handcrafted by expert detectives or crime professionals
restricted.reason: No verified credentials or authorship details are provided.

compliance_notes: Do not fabricate testimonials, ratings, review counts, or customer statistics.
Do not imply the cases are real crimes, real police files, or based on true events unless a case explicitly states that.
Use competitor comparisons only for observable differences like price model, shipping friction, or format, not unsupported quality claims.
Avoid claiming a fixed number of documents for every case beyond the verified range of 14-21.
Do not promise ongoing release cadence, exclusivity, or guarantees unless those become verified product facts.
